entities.name: SWEET SORGHUM
entities.description: A multipurpose crop used for food, feed, and fuel production, suitable for rainfed conditions in semi-arid tropics

entities.name: RAINFED CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental conditions where water is supplied solely by precipitation

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: The geographic region characterized by semi-arid tropical climates

entities.name: ETHANOL PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of producing ethanol from the stalk juice of sweet sorghum

entities.name: ANIMAL FEED
entities.description: The use of crop components like grain and bagasse for livestock nutrition

entities.name: ON-FARM CONDITIONS
entities.description: The actual environment of a farm used for evaluating crop performance

entities.name: CANE YIELD
entities.description: The measure of the amount of cane produced by the crop

entities.name: STALK SUGAR TRAITS
entities.description: Characteristics related to the sugar content within the stalks of the crop

entities.name: STOVER
entities.description: The leaves and stalks of the crop remaining after grain harvest, used as feed

entities.name: CSH 22 SS
entities.description: A specific hybrid of sweet sorghum found to be feasible and profitable under rainfed conditions

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The measure of the amount of grain produced by the crop

entities.name: SUGAR YIELD
entities.description: The measure of the amount of sugar produced by the crop

entities.name: STOVER YIELD
entities.description: The measure of the amount of stover produced by the crop

entities.name: BIO-FUEL VALUE
entities.description: The utility and value of the crop for the production of biofuels

entities.name: EFFECTIVE RUMEN DEGRADABLE DRY MATTER
entities.description: A measure of the dry matter in sweet sorghum bagasse that is degradable in the rumen

entities.name: EFFECTIVE RUMEN DEGRADABLE PROTEIN
entities.description: A measure of the protein in sweet sorghum bagasse that is degradable in the rumen

entities.name: DIGESTIBLE CRUDE PROTEIN
entities.description: The portion of crude protein in the feed that is digestible by the animal

entities.name: TOTAL DIGESTIBLE NUTRIENTS
entities.description: A measure of the total energy available from the feed after digestion

entities.name: SHEEP
entities.description: Livestock used to evaluate the nutritive value of sweet sorghum bagasse

entities.name: BUFFALOES
entities.description: Livestock used to evaluate the nutritive value of sweet sorghum bagasse

entities.name: ON-FARM EVALUATION
entities.description: The process of assessing elite genotypes in real-world farming environments

entities.name: CORRELATION STUDIES
entities.description: Statistical analysis used to identify associations between different crop traits

entities.name: ON-FARM ANIMAL EXPERIMENTS
entities.description: Experiments conducted on livestock in farm settings to test feed quality

entities.name: BAGASSE
entities.description: The fibrous residue remaining after crushing the stalks, used as animal feed

entities.name: ROUGHAGE
entities.description: Bulky feed, such as stover and bagasse, providing fiber for livestock
